hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read fp; case "$fp" in src/app/api/*/route.ts) if ! echo "$fp" | grep -q '/api/v1/'; then echo 'API routes MUST be created under src/app/api/v1/**. Use /api/v1/<domain>/<resource>/route.ts pattern. See API-001.' >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read fp; case "$fp" in src/features/*.ts|src/features/*.tsx|src/lib/*.ts|src/lib/*.tsx) if [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -qE "from ['\"]@/app/" "$fp" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[ARCH-002] features/ and lib/ MUST NOT import from @/app/**. Dependency direction: app -> features -> lib (never reverse).' >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read fp; case "$fp" in src/app/api/*/route.ts) if ! echo "$fp" | grep -q '/api/v1/'; then echo '[API-001] WARNING: API route is NOT under /api/v1/**. Move to src/app/api/v1/<domain>/<resource>/route.ts' >&2; fi;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read fp; case "$fp" in *.sql) if [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -q 'auth\.uid()' "$fp" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q '(select auth\.uid())' "$fp" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[SB-003] WARNING: RLS policy uses bare auth.uid(). MUST use (select auth.uid()) pattern for performance.' >&2; fi;; esac; }
